name: Ginger Walnut Drop Biscuit
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
1/4 pound piece of gingerroot, peeled & chopped
press through a garlic press to make 1/4 cup puree and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add the butter and blend until it resembles meal.
3. Stir in the ginger puree and juice, brown sugar, and walnuts.
4. Add the milk and stir until it forms a soft sticky dough.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an unbuttered baking sheet.
6. Bake the biscuits in the middle of a preheated 425°F oven for 15 to 17 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Makes about 18 biscuits.
